title: Exact positive part coordinate
statement: For every registered finite partition of the structural One that is complete, disjoint and equal-fibred, and every nonempty held selection contained within it, the unique parameter-free exact part coordinate is the pair of positive counts identifying the held selection and the complete partition.

candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of partition coverage, partition overlap, fibre equality, selection relation, held-count presence, whole-count presence and unforced-extra-coordinate presence.
candidate_grammar.boundary: All coordinate forms for a selection relative to a registered finite partition of the structural One, classified only by completeness, disjointness, equal-fibre status, selection containment, the two exact positive count records and unforced extra data.

excluded_inputs: V2 part, fraction, division or Fold definitions
conventional rational-number axioms or fraction-reduction rules
semantic numerical zero or an empty selection as a magnitude
negative, irrational, imaginary or floating proof quantities
completed infinity or an ungenerated continuum
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the 192-form criterion product and its unique exact held/whole coordinate form.
